name: Wand of Hopeless Night (4th-Rank Spell)
description:
This wand is a length of wrought black iron.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast at 4th-rank. Each creature that ends its turn within the spell's area must succeed at a save or become Frightened 1 (Frightened 2 on a critical failure).

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of darkness at 4th-rank.
